# Word Document Draft Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Word-Ready Document Draft — <Title>

> Intended audience:
> Purpose:
> Status: Draft for review

## Executive summary

## Background

## Current state

## Analysis / key points

## Recommendations / next steps

## Decisions or approvals needed

## Appendix / supporting detail

## Reviewer notes and open questions
```
